series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with authorization to use, moor or tie-up at a state or private dock. This series includes, but is not limited to: any application, license, fee, or other record related to a dock license for state or private dock.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency-Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor ; Paper: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed
